title: Jumble Dream Busy Cube Sensory Toys - Montessori Wooden Activity Cube Baby Toy - Travel Toddler Toys for Early Development Educational Fidget Cube for kids Autism & ADHD
features: 𝐉𝐔𝐌𝐁𝐋𝐄 𝐁𝐔𝐒𝐘 𝐂𝐔𝐁𝐄: Join our jumbling journey of toddler sensory play and discovery! Jumble Cubes are handmade Montessori busy cubes, perfect for early development in toddlers. These wooden sensory toys inspire children with hands-on learning, designed to enhance cognitive growth following Montessori principles.

𝐅𝐈𝐃𝐆𝐄𝐓 𝐓𝐎𝐘𝐒: The wooden fidget board components are were carefully designed to support motor skill and cognitive development. This sensory cube includes elements like a spinning hourglass, lock and key, spring doorstop, and fidget spinner. It's an ideal sensory cube for engaging toddlers in interactive play.

𝐇𝐀𝐍𝐃𝐌𝐀𝐃𝐄 𝐓𝐎𝐘𝐒: Hand-assembled with care, this wooden activity cube is perfect for boys and girls. Featuring smooth, non-toxic paint, the wooden busy board provides a safe and engaging sensory experience, designed for endless learning and play.

𝐓𝐑𝐀𝐕𝐄𝐋 𝐆𝐀𝐌𝐄𝐒: Designed for on-the-go entertainment, this sturdy activity cube for 3 year old is perfect for travel, whether by plane or car. The toddler travel toys offers engaging activities to keep kids occupied on long trips, while being tough enough to withstand bumps and drops.

𝐄𝐀𝐑𝐋𝐘 𝐋𝐄𝐀𝐑𝐍𝐈𝐍𝐆 𝐏𝐋𝐀𝐘: Ideal for children with autism or learning disabilities, this autism sensory toy enhances dexterity and early cognitive skills. If your child enjoys busy boards or books, this Montessori busy cube offers a richer sensory experience with endless possibilities for imagination and learning.

𝐒𝐄𝐍𝐒𝐎𝐑𝐘 𝐓𝐎𝐘𝐒 𝐅𝐎𝐑 𝐀𝐔𝐓𝐈𝐒𝐌 & 𝐀𝐃𝐇𝐃: This Montessori sensory board is specifically designed for kids with special needs, providing stimulating sensory activities that promote self-regulation and reduce stress. It’s a perfect addition for homes or classrooms supporting children with autism and ADHD.
description: Product Description Quality Tested We take immense pride in crafting the perfect sensory toy companion. Every busy cubes undergoes testing to ensure safety and durability. If you ever have problems with Jumble toys then we'll be happy to help. Charity Partnership We've partnered with Mencap to donate a fixed amount with every Jumble toy sold to help children and adults with disabilities. With your help we hope to make a huge difference! Special Needs Toys The busy cube is a great toy for children with special needs or anxiety, it offers engaging sensory stimulation, develops fine motor skills and provides a calming outlet for self regulation and focus Eye Catching Packaging All Jumble toys arrive in our sturdy, eye-catching and gift ready packaging. Adding an extra touch of magic, perfect for birthdays and Christmas.
